_provenance.captured_from: tests/fixtures/accounting/pendle_pt/expected_baseline.sqlite (VIB-5314 real-fork PT buy->hold->sell round-trip on Arbitrum; same DB as the ratchet fixture)
_provenance.note: Real-Anvil baseline (same DB the check-accounting-ratchet gate scores). PEN1/2/3/4/5/6 PASS. VIB-5319 advanced the generic cells off the typed PendleAccountingEvent: G3 PASS = the yield-ledger cell reads PT realized_yield_usd (the PT strategy's entire realised payoff). G1 XFAIL + G6 XFAIL = the PT disposal's GROSS USD (money-trail leg G1; reconciliation proceeds sy_amount×sy_price G6) is unmeasured because the sell-side SY price is absent on this fork (sy_price=None on PT_SELL — the gateway PT/SY implied-price path, same VIB-5276 root cause as the OPEN-side PT price). These are MEASURED XFAILs (measured-but-blocked, not a books error and not a fabricated PASS), narrowly scoped via the pendle_pt profile's disposal_usd_unmeasured_is_xfail flag to the one ticketed null bucket — any OTHER unmeasured leg still FAILs. VIB-5276 promoted PEN3 (open-PT mark-to-market) XFAIL→PASS: the gateway PT implied-price path (PT/USD = pt_to_asset_rate × underlying/USD) is wired through MarketSnapshot.pt_price into the portfolio valuer (VIB-5313 reprice + VIB-5316 FIFO-inventory consumer), and the PEN3 cell predicate now reads the open-PT mark off the snapshot's pt_inventory_lots row instead of being hardcoded XFAIL. This frozen DB's last snapshot already carries a MEASURED open-PT row (value_usd=26.51, cost_basis_usd=21.44, unrealized_pnl_usd=5.07, price_confidence=STALE) — STALE is a measured mark (Empty ≠ Zero keys on the mark_unmeasured flag, not on confidence), so PEN3 measures PASS with no DB re-capture. G11 SKIP = no failed intents in the round-trip. G14/G15/L5_22 XFAIL = Track-C / registry-mode not on for this run (same shape as every other primitive's frozen fixture).
